steps.title: Identify the relationship between sentences
steps.content: The passage moves from a general description of the project (wind turbines off Virginia's coast) to specific concrete details about its configuration. The key signal is the shift from general claim to precise specification.

steps.title: Match the transition to the relationship
steps.content: To be exact, signals that precise details are coming to specify a prior claim. The other transitions signal completion (in conclusion), causation (as a result), or contradiction (in contrast), none of which fit. That matches choice A — A is correct.
